description: A variable annuity holder wants to see the historical performance of their investment subaccounts.

nodes.task_description: Identify the contract holder and the subaccounts they are invested in.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies the customer and their current investments.

nodes.task_description: Generate a report showing the 1-year, 5-year, and 10-year performance for their selected funds.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully generates the performance report.

nodes.task_description: Send the report to the customer.
